title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
